# Desktop/MSIX Consumption and CDN Mirror

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/releaseartifacts -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Release Artifacts](../release-artifacts.md)

Riido Desktop treats the daemon binary as a helper release artifact:

- select the asset by platform and architecture
- download it over HTTPS from GitHub Release asset
- verify `SHA256SUMS`
- extract the binary under user-writable app data
- execute it as the current user without requiring administrator-owned paths

The launcher passes `RIIDO_DEVICE_ID`, `RIIDO_DEVICE_SECRET`, `RIIDO_SAAS_URL` when starting the daemon.

## CDN latest mirror

GitHub Releases remain immutable. `https://cdn.riido.io/releases/latest/ai-agent/` is a mutable development/test mirror only.

The mirror is published by `.github/workflows/cdn-latest-ai-agent.yml` using `scripts/publish-cdn-latest.sh` when a GitHub Release is published, with manual resync available through workflow dispatch.

Mirror paths:

- releases/latest/ai-agent/riido-daemon_darwin_arm64.tar.gz
- releases/latest/ai-agent/riido-daemon_darwin_amd64.tar.gz

The archive `VERSION` file must identify the release tag that was mirrored.
